fixes.extra_steps:
**Resident Evil Requiem - Build 22277314**

Download:
[Resident Evil Requiem 3764200 Build 22277314 Downloader.rar](https://generator.ryuu.lol/files/Resident_Evil_Requiem_3764200_Build_22277314_Downloader.rar)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

**FRESH INSTALL**
1. Extract the .rar anywhere
2. Run download.bat
3. It will download Build 22277314 in the current directory, in the Resident Evil Requiem Folder
4. Download and apply the fix after it finishes

**DOWNGRADE EXISTING INSTALL**
1. Extract the .rar into your existing game folder
2. Run download.bat
3. It will automatically downgrade your game to Build 22277314

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

**GAME SAVES**
C:\Users\<user>\AppData\Roaming\GSE Saves\3764200\remote
Use [MandarinJuice](https://github.com/mi5hmash/MandarinJuice) to load or transfer saves

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

**PREVENT STEAM AUTO-UPDATES (Optional?)**
Right-click the game's .acf file > Properties > check Read-only
This stops Steam from overwriting your downgraded build.
